title: Speed-to-value frame lands on 62% of discovery calls
anchor: Gong transcript analysis shows speed-to-value re-stated on 17 of 27 sampled April calls.
connect: Platform-consolidation frame appears on just 5 calls in the same sample.
body: Gong transcript analysis shows speed-to-value re-stated on 17 of 27 sampled April calls. Platform-consolidation frame appears on just 5 calls in the same sample.
trace: Discovery call message resonance shows the Q2 positioning refresh is getting pickup in prospect conversations.

title: ICP match rate climbs to 78% on new logos
anchor: Q2 2026 new customer fit sits at 28 of 36 closed deals versus 23 of 36 in Q1.
connect: ICP-aligned wins close 12 days faster than non-ICP wins on average.
body: Q2 2026 new customer fit sits at 28 of 36 closed deals versus 23 of 36 in Q1. ICP-aligned wins close 12 days faster than non-ICP wins on average.
trace: Customer acquisition quality is improving with better ICP targeting showing both fit and cycle benefits.

title: Beacon Systems win rate jumps to 64% head-to-head
anchor: Q2 2026 Beacon competitive deals closed 14 wins in 22 head-to-head opportunities.
connect: Trailing four quarters averaged 28% win rate on the same competitor.
body: Q2 2026 Beacon competitive deals closed 14 wins in 22 head-to-head opportunities. Trailing four quarters averaged 28% win rate on the same competitor.
trace: Major competitive positioning improvement against primary competitor, likely driven by battlecard refresh and positioning changes.

title: Battlecard adoption climbs to 61% on competitive deals
anchor: Q2 2026 reps opened battlecards on 38 of 62 Beacon competitive opportunities.
connect: Q1 utilization sat at 22% on the same competitive surface.
body: Q2 2026 reps opened battlecards on 38 of 62 Beacon competitive opportunities. Q1 utilization sat at 22% on the same competitive surface.
trace: Sales enablement adoption nearly tripled quarter-over-quarter on the primary competitive battlecard.

title: Verge IO surfaces in 24% of competitive opportunities
anchor: Q2 2026 Verge IO appeared in 18 of 75 total competitive deals versus 11% in Q1.
connect: Emergence concentrates in mid-market segment following their $40M Series B in March.
body: Q2 2026 Verge IO appeared in 18 of 75 total competitive deals versus 11% in Q1. Emergence concentrates in mid-market segment following their $40M Series B in March.
trace: New competitive threat gaining share in core mid-market segment, likely capitalizing on funding momentum.

title: Northstar objection handling lifts win rate 9 points
anchor: Post-April 8 battlecard update shows 51% win rate on Northstar head-to-heads versus 42% before.
connect: Northstar mentions in Gong calls dropped 22% in the four weeks following the update.
body: Post-April 8 battlecard update shows 51% win rate on Northstar head-to-heads versus 42% before. Northstar mentions in Gong calls dropped 22% in the four weeks following the update.
trace: Battlecard enhancement showing measurable competitive improvement with both win rate and conversation frequency benefits.

title: April 8 launch generates $420K pipeline in first 3 weeks
anchor: Atlas CRM Sync launch created 14 new opportunities across the initial campaign window.
connect: Prior launch in October produced $310K in the same 3-week measurement window.
body: Atlas CRM Sync launch created 14 new opportunities across the initial campaign window. Prior launch in October produced $310K in the same 3-week measurement window.
trace: Launch pipeline generation improved 35% over prior product launch baseline.

title: Launch-attributed pipeline crosses 18% of Q2 net new
anchor: Q2 2026 launch-attributable opportunities total $620K of $3.4M quarter pipeline.
connect: April launch alone contributed $420K in the first three weeks.
body: Q2 2026 launch-attributable opportunities total $620K of $3.4M quarter pipeline. April launch alone contributed $420K in the first three weeks.
trace: Launch motion becoming significant pipeline contributor, representing nearly one-fifth of quarterly net new opportunity creation.

title: Asset-opening reps produce 2.4x launch pipeline
anchor: April 8 launch first 14 days show clear correlation between battlecard adoption and opportunity creation.
connect: 71% of reps opened launch assets versus 42% adoption on the prior launch.
body: April 8 launch first 14 days show clear correlation between battlecard adoption and opportunity creation. 71% of reps opened launch assets versus 42% adoption on the prior launch.
trace: Sales enablement effectiveness improving with both higher adoption rates and stronger pipeline correlation for engaged reps.

title: May 15 launch clears readiness 10 days before ship
anchor: Atlas Forecast Pro positioning brief, battlecard, and sales briefing signed off May 5.
connect: Prior launch positioning brief cleared just 2 days before ship date.
body: Atlas Forecast Pro positioning brief, battlecard, and sales briefing signed off May 5. Prior launch positioning brief cleared just 2 days before ship date.
trace: Launch process maturity showing significant improvement in readiness timeline and cross-functional coordination.

title: Earned media pickup climbs to 42% on April launch
anchor: 22 of 53 outreached publications covered the Atlas CRM Sync announcement.
connect: Prior launch earned 28% pickup rate on similar outreach volume.
body: 22 of 53 outreached publications covered the Atlas CRM Sync announcement. Prior launch earned 28% pickup rate on similar outreach volume.
trace: PR and media relations showing improved performance with higher coverage rate on product announcements.

title: Enterprise inbound conversion lifts 8 points with new positioning
anchor: Q2 2026 enterprise inbound-to-meeting conversion shows measurable improvement from positioning refresh.
connect: Enterprise inbound pipeline with positioning hook sits at $290K for the quarter.
body: Q2 2026 enterprise inbound-to-meeting conversion shows measurable improvement from positioning refresh. Enterprise inbound pipeline with positioning hook sits at $290K for the quarter.
trace: New positioning framework showing conversion benefits in the enterprise segment with measurable pipeline contribution.

title: Close reason capture hits 92% in Q2 deals
anchor: 47 of 51 Q2 closed deals include structured outcome reasons in CRM versus 71% in Q1.
connect: Data quality improvement creates better competitive intelligence feedback loop.
body: 47 of 51 Q2 closed deals include structured outcome reasons in CRM versus 71% in Q1. Data quality improvement creates better competitive intelligence feedback loop.
trace: CRM data hygiene showing significant improvement, providing better foundation for competitive analysis and positioning refinement.

title: Implementation timeline surfaces as positioning theme
anchor: April customer exit interviews show implementation expectations in 2 of 6 surfaced themes.
connect: Same theme appears in 31% of Beacon Systems competitive deals this quarter.
body: April customer exit interviews show implementation expectations in 2 of 6 surfaced themes. Same theme appears in 31% of Beacon Systems competitive deals this quarter.
trace: Customer success insights revealing positioning adjustments needed, with clear correlation to competitive objection patterns.

title: Integration breadth theme crosses competitive and churn signals
anchor: Integration breadth appears in customer exit interviews and Beacon competitive deals consistently.
connect: 31% of Beacon deals surface this objection alongside implementation timeline concerns.
body: Integration breadth appears in customer exit interviews and Beacon competitive deals consistently. 31% of Beacon deals surface this objection alongside implementation timeline concerns.
trace: Cross-domain signal showing product positioning gap affecting both retention and competitive win rate.

title: Launch pipeline velocity doubles first-7-day performance
anchor: April 8 launch first-week pipeline creation runs at 2.0x the prior launch baseline.
connect: Earned media correlation shows 42% pickup rate driving early pipeline acceleration.
body: April 8 launch first-week pipeline creation runs at 2.0x the prior launch baseline. Earned media correlation shows 42% pickup rate driving early pipeline acceleration.
trace: Launch execution showing improved time-to-pipeline with stronger media coverage contributing to faster opportunity generation.
